1.reason: Array size is only 10, but indices from 1 to n (n up to 10) cause out-of-bounds access (e.g., a[10] and book[10] are invalid). Should be at least size 11.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Array size is only 10, but indices from 1 to n (n up to 10) cause out-of-bounds access (e.g., a[10] and book[10] are invalid). Should be at least size 11.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  array size should be at least 11 to safely access indices 1..n when n=10
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Array size is 10, but indices 1 to N (up to 10) are accessed, causing out-of-bounds error when N=10. Size should be at least 11.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Array size should be at least 11 to safely access indices 1 to N when N=10, otherwise accessing index 10 causes out-of-bounds error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Array size is insufficient for N=10 when using 1-based indexing; should be at least size 11 or 15 as in reference]
